description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/wf-schedule-weather-slack.json: the same request sent as a real build prompt, no classification preamble. Gold mirrors the exam case ({anchor: wf, embedsOther: false}) expressed as observable routing behavior.

conversation.text: Every weekday at 9am, Slack me the Berlin weather forecast.

processExpectations: The agent builds this as a workflow using the workflow-building tools, and does not create an n8n Agent via the agent-builder path (agent_builder / create_agent tools).
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
outcomeExpectations: The workflow starts from a schedule trigger on a weekday-morning cadence, fetches the Berlin weather, and posts it to Slack, without embedding an AI Agent node.
